name: Kaiju Capture Mission
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>捕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>作</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, if there are less than 3 Kaiju Counters on this card: You can target 1 "Kaiju" monster on the field; change it to face-down Defense Position, then place 1 Kaiju Counter on this card (max. 3). If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can draw 2 cards. You can only use this effect of "Kaiju Capture Mission" once per turn.
eff: Once per turn, if there are less than 3 Kaiju Counters on this card: You can target 1 "Kaiju" monster on the field; change it to face-down Defense Position, then place 1 Kaiju Counter on this card (max. 3). If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can draw 2 cards. You can only use this effect of "Kaiju Capture Mission" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
